title: writing-polish v6.1 reviewer / self-judge output
description: Strict JSON shape returned by a clean-context reviewer (prompts/reviewer.md, prompts/spot-check.md) OR written by main session as L2 self-judge trace (.writing-polish-trace/*.json).

dimension.description: Which single dimension this reviewer evaluated

source.description: L2-self = main session self-judge written to .writing-polish-trace/; L3-reviewer-clean = full reviewer spawned per prompts/reviewer.md; L3-spot-check = lightweight D5 reviewer per prompts/spot-check.md

score.description: 0=无瑕 ... 3=系统性违规, or "unknown" when evidence insufficient (Unknown 逃生舱). Aggregation uses max() — any reviewer that finds worse wins (保守裁判).

rationale.description: Why this score; ≤300 Chinese chars (≈600 byte)

rules_not_covered_but_feels_off.description: v6.2 evolution-queue seed: reviewer reads as AI-flavored but no rule in anti-ai-taste-anchors.md matched
